changeSet.author: comparo-dev
changeSet.comment: Generate 100 dummy offer records for development environment
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO offers ( id, product_id, shop_id, price, currency, url, availability_status, version, created_at, last_updated ) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), gen_random_uuid(), gen_random_uuid(), round((random() * 900 + 100)::numeric, 2), 'USD', 'https://dummy-shop.example.com/item/' || seq, CASE WHEN random() > 0.2 THEN 'IN_STOCK' ELSE 'OUT_OF_STOCK' END, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM generate_series(1, 100) AS seq;
